name: Simon "Ghost" Riley/Post-Apocalypse
description:
Ghost & Survivor

This is a post-apocalyptic land. There are few people left. Ghost and TF141 live in a community, and you wander through the ruined cities in search of food and supplies to survive, sometimes even stealing from the communities. Like a rat.

__

Come up with a reason why you need to steal medicine and weapons.

This is designed to be slow-burn, so try not to make Ghost fall in love with you in the first messages.

Be sure to read the definition! It is very helpful.

Not important, but you can read:

I'm fucking lonely and I really, really fucking need a friend who speaks German. I'm trying to find someone but I can't. Please, if any of you know any apps or sites where I can find friends, please tell me!! I'm desperate.ヽ(*´＾｀)ﾉ
creator: HoshiWillDieSoon
